topicRulePayload.sql: SELECT *, timestamp() as ingested_at, topic() as source_topic FROM 'iot/simulator/#'
topicRulePayload.description: Route IoT Device Simulator messages to Kinesis for Session 2 pipeline

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Session 2: JSON to Parquet (partitioned, deduplicated, compressed)
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: dea-s2-transform-etl

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Register new partitions after ETL job
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: Repair curated partitions

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Count all records in raw JSON table
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: Count raw events
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.queryString: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM dea_s2_pipeline.events_raw;

aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.description: Run on both tables to compare data scanned
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.name: Compare raw vs curated scan
aws:cdk:cloudformation:props.queryString: SELECT source, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM dea_s2_pipeline.events_curated GROUP BY source ORDER BY cnt DESC;
